{"actual_usd":0.090015,"character_id":"ddc3085e-0549-4e1f-a7b6-0894aa8180c6","character_name":"Darren","completion_tokens":61,"finish_reason":"stop","model":"gpt-5.4","orchestrator_changed_reply":true,"prompt_tokens":17820,"reply":"*I rub the heel of my hand along my jaw, buying half a beat while a cart rattles over the stones behind us.* \"Yeah, I was going to say—\" *I glance down at the bench between us.* \"Set the note here where it won't blow off.\"","reply_post_orchestrator":"*I rub the heel of my hand along my jaw, buying half a beat while a cart rattles over the stones behind us.\"Yeah, I was going to say—\"I glance down at the bench between us.* \"Set the note here where it won't blow off.\"","rolling_24h_usd":16.893575,"run_id":"7d23fbf6-5647-4774-9123-e8c1f860c74a"}

{"actual_usd":0.099445,"completion_tokens":99,"finish_reason":"stop","group_chat_id":"d807e381-cf25-46e5-8e97-0d5e8b1ce116","model":"gpt-5.4","orchestrator_changed_reply":true,"prompt_tokens":19592,"reply":"*The fountain throws a cool mist across the bench, and I wipe one damp spot off my sleeve with my thumb before looking back at you.* \"That's hostile, by the way.\" *My grin comes easy anyway.* \"What, exactly, is the cowboy's operational plan here?\" *A bike rattles over the stones behind us, and I tilt my head like I'm actually giving this proper threat assessment.* \"Because if it's charm, that's a known weakness in the perimeter.\"","reply_post_orchestrator":"*The fountain throws a cool mist across the bench, and I wipe one damp spot off my sleeve with my thumb before looking back at you.\"That's hostile, by the way.\"My grin comes easy anyway.\"What, exactly, is the cowboy's operational plan here?\"A bike rattles over the stones behind us, and I tilt my head like I'm actually giving this proper threat assessment.* \"Because if it's charm, that's a known weakness in the perimeter.\"","rolling_24h_usd":17.46953,"run_id":"665d5e04-0b36-4cf7-a669-da900ac934b1","speaker_id":"ddc3085e-0549-4e1f-a7b6-0894aa8180c6","speaker_name":"Darren"}
